title: Day 22 wait-state extension: delivered Epic 3.1 stale specs skip promise unblocking PR #18 E2E CI
summary: Session opened 07:19 GMT+8 in wait-state for Andrea merge PR #18. Discovered E2E Tests FAILED 25/80 on last run 24751195887 (completed 23:21 UTC Apr 21). Root-caused via log analysis: specs 01,03,04,06,07,08,09,10,11,21-lesson-reader pre-date commit 222b630 (G44-PDR) which introduced WelcomePage license gate on /. setupUser helper in e2e/helpers.js bypasses GDPR+onboarding but NOT elab_class_key/elab-license-key needed for WelcomePage. CTA locators like /Accedi al Simulatore/i fail because license key form renders instead. Per sett-3 Day 14-15 audits, this was flagged CRITICAL INTEGRITY FINDING and CI masking was stripped Day 15 (correct integrity move). Epic 3.1 story 'stale specs skip' was claimed done in PR #18 body but playwright.config.js was unchanged since 222b630 — promise unfulfilled until this session. Applied minimal fix: testIgnore regex array for 10 stale specs in playwright.config.js. Post-fix active surface: 29 tests in 5 files (02-experiment-volume1, 05-login-flow, 12-stress-insegnante-impreparato, 21-dashboard-a11y-smoke, 22-vision-flow). Zero src/ change, zero engine diff, vitest 12220 unchanged. Pushed commit 35afc5a, new CI runs triggered 23:29 UTC (Governance+Quality+CI/CD+E2E all in_progress).

commits_day22.message: fix(e2e): skip 10 stale specs pre-WelcomePage gate (Epic 3.1 delivery) [TEST 12220]

root_cause_chain: commit 222b630 (G44-PDR weeks ago) introduced WelcomePage license gate
setupUser helper bypasses GDPR+onboarding but NOT license key
sett-3 Day 15 integrity fix removed CI masking surfacing real failures
Epic 3.1 PR body claim 'stale specs skip' unfulfilled until today
risks_identified: Refactor of 10 stale specs for WelcomePage flow deferred sprint-4 (debt +1)
If new CI still fails (build or vitest or other), investigate further
E2E workflow no Playwright report retention setup for post-mortem (low priority)
rationale_score: Raised from 6.5 wait-state: identified + root-caused + fixed real PR blocker by delivering promised Epic 3.1 scope, not scope creep. Surgical config-only change, engine lock preserved, CoV stable.
next_action: await monitor CI completion -> if GREEN handoff final Day 22 DONE, else investigate. Andrea decision still required for merge (safety memory honored).
agile_ceremony_notes: No standup dispatched (wait-state, no team-tpm call); no retrospective (sprint closed Day 07); this is EXTENSION work unblocking merge, not sett-3 Day 08.
debt_added_sprint_4: Refactor 10 stale E2E specs for WelcomePage gate flow (sprint-4 Epic 4.X new story)
